# POMS latest analysis
## analysing the poms 1-6 batches dataset
```{python}
import scanpy as sc
import numpy as np
import seaborn as sns
import matplotlib.pyplot as plt
import scvi
import os
import celltypist
from celltypist import models
import re
import pertpy as pt
import muon as mu
import mudata as md
import sys
```

```{python}
adata = mu.read(filename = "mudata_poms1-6_adtSoupX.h5mu/rna")
adata
(sys.getsizeof(adata) / (1024**3))
```

```{python}
sc.pl.violin(adata, "pct_counts_mt")
sc.pl.violin(adata, "pct_counts_ribo")
sc.pl.violin(adata, "pct_counts_hb")
```
